title: Asterix and Cleopatra
writer: René Goscinny, Albert Uderzo, Pierre Tchernia
actors: Roger Carel, Jacques Morel, Micheline Dax
plot: Cleopatra decides to prove to Julius Caesar that her people are not decadent by building a palace in less than three months. When Cleopatra's architect asks the Gallic druid Getafix for help, Asterix and Obelix accompany him to Eg...
